description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade Java Development Kit (JDK) to version 21, update build configuration files (pom.xml or build.gradle) to target Java 21, and resolve any API deprecations or breaking changes introduced in Java 9-21
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Java from 8 to 21 LTS. Updated pom.xml compiler settings to Java 21, upgraded Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.3.5 (necessary for Java 21 LTS support), migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.constraints.* to jakarta.* namespace in Photo.java, and updated Dockerfile to use eclipse-temurin:21 images. Build passes and unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest LTS)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot framework to version 3.4, upgrade Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate javax.* packages to jakarta.* namespace, update Spring dependencies, and resolve any breaking changes in Spring Boot 3.x
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Spring Boot to version 3.4.7 (latest Spring Boot 3.4.x LTS). Updated pom.xml spring-boot-starter-parent from 3.3.5 to 3.4.7. Spring Framework transitively upgraded to 6.2.x via BOM. Jakarta namespace already fully migrated. Build passes and unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all third-party dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, resolve any transitive dependency conflicts, and ensure all dependencies are secure and actively maintained
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.21.0 to resolve a security vulnerability (XmlStreamReader DoS, patched in 2.14.0). All other dependencies are managed by the Spring Boot 3.4.7 BOM and are at compatible, secure versions. Build passes and unit tests pass.
